resolutions.finding: Frozen tasks link final oracles that cannot all run in Stage 1.
resolutions.resolution: Added seven stage-local acceptance contracts; every linked AC remains PARTIAL or NOT_RUN and zero final AC is reported PASS.

resolutions.finding: Stage 0 included a gate that intentionally prohibited Stage 1 runtime files.
resolutions.resolution: Preserved the frozen Stage 0 package and all enduring checks; retired only scope.no_stage1_or_deployment in the cumulative Stage 1 validator.

resolutions.finding: A custom encryption stand-in would not prove the age boundary.
resolutions.resolution: Used the official age CLI with stdin plaintext, an auto-cleaned synthetic identity and exact recovered-byte comparison.

resolutions.finding: A synthetic remote could be misreported as production GitHub recovery.
resolutions.resolution: Named it an in-memory ciphertext store and kept AC-027 plus every production gate NOT_RUN or PARTIAL.

resolutions.finding: Direct dependency pins do not prove the final supply-chain oracle.
resolutions.resolution: Pinned direct dependencies and Action SHAs for base CI while keeping AC-021 PARTIAL; transitive hashes and vulnerability gates remain Stage 2.

controlled_unknowns: real Gmail sender registry and OAuth behavior
single private GitHub database permissions and recovery
Processed parsers, Timeline replacement and exact message Trash
next_stage: S2 may start only in a later run; no GitHub upload or production action is allowed in this run.
